entity.summary: Indian centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2016. Current first-party and exchange-profile sources continue to present BuyUcoin as an operating exchange, so HEI classifies it as active.
entity.notes: Launch date is stored at year precision because exact day-level launch evidence was not recovered in this batch. No terminal event was recovered.

events.title: BuyUcoin began operating in India
events.description: BuyUcoin began operating as an Indian cryptocurrency exchange in 2016.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker from first-party and exchange-profile sources.

evidence.title: BuyUcoin official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website confirms the operating BuyUcoin exchange identity.

evidence.title: BuyUcoin exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies BuyUcoin as an India-based exchange launched in 2016.
